stemHtml:
You are en route to an airport with a TAF valid from 0600Z:

METAR:
LPPR 200850Z 0915 9999 SHRA TEMPO 4500 SHRA

TAF:
LPPR 200300Z 0600/2200 QNH 1013
PROB30 0600/2200 5000 SHRA

Given the information above, what visibility condition are you most likely to encounter upon arrival at 0915Z?

options.a: Visibility of 5000 associated with heavy showers (but heavy was not mentioned in TAF or METAR).
options.b: Visibility of 9999, with a 30% chance of reduction to 5000.
